metadata.description: PostPilot Labs — free, read-only marketing audit tools for DTC and ecommerce brands. Point Claude at your own store's data and get a shareable report in minutes. No data leaves your account.

plugins.name: klaviyo-customer-scoring
plugins.description: Free RFM customer-scoring audit for any Klaviyo account. Read-only and self-service (uses your own read-only API key). Samples the buyer base representatively, uses true purchase recency, extrapolates to the full customer file, and outputs a self-contained HTML report: the value gap, revenue concentration, lifecycle + engagement bubble grids, and a sized direct-mail winback opportunity. Engagement is based on clicks/on-site (email opens flagged as Apple-MPP-inflated).
